title: VisionCore Mission Input
description: Contrato de entrada para missão do Go Safe Core V5.0

root.description: Caminho absoluto ou relativo do projeto alvo. Nunca pode conter ../

input.description: Texto da missão em linguagem natural ou identificador de self-test

dry_run.description: Se true, nenhum arquivo é alterado. V5.0 sempre dry_run=true.

mission_id.description: ID opcional da missão. Se omitido, gerado automaticamente.

memory_recorded.description: V6.2 output field: true when a PASS GOLD + PASS SECURE mission wrote a passive remediation memory event.

memory_event_id.description: V6.2 output field: ID of the passive remediation memory event when recorded.

memory_warning.description: V6.2 output field: non-critical memory persistence warning; never changes PASS GOLD/PASS SECURE decisions.

github_pr_plan_id.description: V7.0 output field: deterministic PASS GOLD gated PR plan identifier.

github_pr_branch.description: V7.0 output field: sanitized remediation work branch planned for PR.

github_pr_can_open.description: V7.0 output field: true only when PASS GOLD, PASS SECURE and all PR gates pass with changed files.

github_pr_block_reason.description: V7.0 output field: objective reason PR opening is blocked.

github_pr_title.description: V7.0 output field: generated PR title.

github_pr_status_context.description: V7.0 output field: GitHub status context, always vision/pass-gold for PASS GOLD checks.

github_pr_status_state.description: V7.0 output field: generated status state; success only with PASS GOLD + PASS SECURE and zero blocking findings.

github_pr_dry_run.description: V7.0 output field: true when no external GitHub write occurs.
